subcodes.title: Ziyaratu’l-Jami’ati’s-Saghira
subcodes.first_line: I bear witness that there is no God except God alone. There can be no doubt about this. And I testify that Muhammad is indeed His servant, and His Messenger
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. اشهد ان لا اله الا الله وحده لا شريک له و اشهد ان محمد عبده و رسوله اللهم صل علي محمد
